mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant negative correlation with FEDFUNDS levels.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0 percent, it signals labor market deterioration and elevated recession probability, triggering risk-off flows and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction with accuracy above 52 percent in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high consumer price inflation and declining total payrolls indicate stagflationary pressure, forcing central banks to maintain restrictive policy while corporate margins contract, driving negative returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a positive Sharpe ratio over 20-day horizons, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression of forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity and improving supply chain conditions, which boost corporate earnings forecasts and generate positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative in more than 60 percent of periods where INDPRO increases, or the signal predictive power vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing retail sales demonstrate robust consumer spending, directly supporting corporate revenue growth and equity valuations, resulting in positive short-term market returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with RSAFS growth, or the signal generates a negative cumulative return over a 1-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises while CPI inflation declines, real interest rates increase, strengthening the currency and reducing inflation risk premiums, which supports positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction produces negative 20-day returns in over 58 percent of cases, or the combined signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in nonfarm payrolls exceeding 100,000 signals abrupt demand destruction and weakening economic momentum, causing investors to price in lower earnings and sell equities.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in more than 65 percent of triggered months, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions with a statistically significant t-statistic.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts and real GDP indicates broad-based credit expansion and household wealth accumulation, driving risk appetite and positive equity market performance.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of observations, or the interaction effect becomes insignificant when tested against a rolling 5-year sample.
